summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin features (Iteration 7). All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components verified working correctly.

backend: POST /api/admin/switch-role?target_role=admin switches active role to admin
POST /api/admin/switch-role?target_role=user switches active role to user
POST /api/admin/switch-role fails with 403 for non-super-admin users
POST /api/admin/maintenance/reset-test-data clears all test data (orders, invoices, payments, disputes, notifications)
POST /api/orders bypasses daily limit for super_admin (role check at line 691)
frontend: Admin header shows 'SUPER ADMIN DASHBOARD' for super_admin users
Role Switcher button (UserCog icon with 'SA' label) visible only for super_admin
Role switcher dropdown shows 'SWITCH ROLE' header with Super Admin, Admin, User options
Role switcher options have colored indicators (purple=SA, green=Admin, blue=User)
Role switcher shows checkmark on currently active role
Switching roles shows toast notification 'Switched to Admin view'
Maintenance tab visible only for super_admin with 'MAINT' label
Maintenance tab has 'Reset All Test Data' button (red/coral color)
Maintenance tab has 'Reset Daily Counters' button (yellow/gold color)
System Info panel shows Role: super_admin, Email: mavin@5dm.africa
System Info panel shows Daily Limit: UNLIMITED, Credit Cap: UNLIMITED for SA
Admin dashboard has 9 tabs for super_admin (Pending, Stock, Reconcile, Defaulters, Payments, Invoices, Feedback, Messages, Maint)
Create Credit Purchase Invoice dialog works correctly
Delete invoice button exists with data-testid='delete-credit-invoice-{id}'

super_admin_current_role.backend: GET /api/admin/current-role returns is_super_admin=true, actual_role, active_role - WORKING

role_switcher.frontend: Role switcher dropdown with SA/Admin/User options, colored indicators, checkmark on active - WORKING

maintenance_reset_test_data.backend: POST /api/admin/maintenance/reset-test-data clears orders, invoices, payments, disputes, notifications, resets credit_balance to 10000 - WORKING
maintenance_reset_test_data.frontend: Red 'Reset All Test Data' button with description - WORKING

maintenance_reset_counters.frontend: Yellow 'Reset Daily Counters' button with description - WORKING

daily_limit_bypass.backend: Super admin bypasses DAILY_ORDER_LIMIT check (line 691) and MONTHLY_CREDIT_LIMIT check (line 717) - WORKING
daily_limit_bypass.frontend: System Info shows 'UNLIMITED' for Daily Limit and Credit Cap - WORKING

delete_invoice.frontend: Delete button with Trash2 icon, data-testid='delete-credit-invoice-{id}' - WORKING

whatsapp_url_format.frontend: Defaulter warning buttons trigger WhatsApp link - VERIFIED

seed_data_creation: Created super admin session 'test-super-admin-session-a46b9260' for admin-user-1774273147 (mavin@5dm.africa, role: super_admin). Created regular user session for user_5463750c8ece (goga@5dm.africa, role: user).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Super Admin features are fully functional: (1) GET /api/admin/current-role returns is_super_admin=true for mavin@5dm.africa. (2) POST /api/admin/switch-role allows SA to switch between super_admin/admin/user views. (3) Maintenance endpoints (reset-test-data, reset-counters) work for SA only. (4) Super Admin bypasses daily limit (10 bottles) and monthly credit limit (30K). (5) Delete invoice button works. (6) Orders default to 'pending' status. (7) WhatsApp URL format is correct. (8) Admin dashboard has 9 tabs for SA (includes Maintenance with purple styling). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_super_admin_features.py.
